title: Charges Dismissed in Richneck School Shooting Case
summary: Felony child neglect case against former assistant principal Ebony Parker dismissed, ending the criminal trial related to the 2023 Richneck school shooting.
charlotte_impact: Accountability questions remain regarding the school shooting and the role of school administrators.

title: Citizens Petition Supreme Court to Halt Solar Plant
summary: Citizens group petitions U.S. Supreme Court to stop Silfab Solar facility near Fort Mill schools, alleging constitutional rights violations.
charlotte_impact: Highlights community concerns over industrial development near schools and potential environmental impacts.

title: Planned Power Outages Scheduled for Newton
summary: City officials announce planned power outages in Newton next week for necessary maintenance.
charlotte_impact: Routine maintenance is essential for reliable infrastructure, but outages can disrupt daily life.

title: Teen Detained with 3D-Printed Gun Near School
summary: Teenager detained after being caught with a 3D-printed firearm near North Mecklenburg High School and a CATS bus stop.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about the accessibility of 3D-printed guns and school safety.

title: Shooting Under Investigation in Rock Hill
summary: Police investigate a shooting in Rock Hill where two people were hit by gunfire in a neighborhood early Thursday.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about rising gun violence in local communities.

title: Scattered Storms Forecasted for Late Thursday
summary: Weather forecast predicts scattered storms arriving late Thursday, with unsettled conditions expected throughout the weekend.
charlotte_impact: Weather events can impact daily routines and outdoor activities.

title: Mecklenburg County Budget Hearing Set Amid Rising Costs
summary: Mecklenburg County officials propose flat property taxes amid rising costs, slower revenue growth, and continued demand for services.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the challenges of balancing budget needs with taxpayer affordability.

title: Armed Suspect Arrested After Standoff in Gastonia
summary: Gastonia police arrested an armed suspect suffering a mental health crisis after an active standoff in the Airline Avenue area.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the intersection of mental health and public safety concerns.

title: CRTPO Withdraws Support for I-77 South Toll Lanes
summary: Charlotte Regional Transportation Planning Organization votes to rescind support for the I-77 South toll lane project.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing debates about transportation infrastructure and funding models.

title: Homicide Investigation Underway After NoDa Shooting
summary: Police investigate a homicide after an early morning shooting in the 3200 block of North Davidson Street in NoDa.
charlotte_impact: Increases concerns about violent crime and community safety.

title: TSA Gold Plus Program Aims to Modernize Airport Security
summary: TSA Gold Plus program explores private investments to modernize airport security with advanced scanners and expanded screening lanes.
charlotte_impact: Highlights efforts to improve airport security through innovative funding models.

title: Charlotte Community Calls for Peace After Teen's Death
summary: Community leaders urge non-violent conflict resolution after the shooting death of 16-year-old Joseph Samuel, highlighting resource needs.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the importance of community-led initiatives to address violence.

title: CMPD Bomb Squad Responds to 'Dynamite' Call
summary: CMPD bomb squad responds to a call concerning a 'quantity of dynamite'; Brookshire Boulevard closed between Old Plank Road and Fred D. Alexander Boulevard.
charlotte_impact: Poses a significant public safety risk and requires immediate law enforcement action.

title: Parent Accused of Assaulting Principal at School
summary: Justin Morgan faces charges for assaulting a school employee, disorderly conduct, and ethnic intimidation at a Rowan County school.
charlotte_impact: Highlights concerns about school safety and parent-teacher relations.

title: NC Voters to Decide on Income, Property Tax Limits
summary: North Carolinians will vote on constitutional amendments to cap the state's income tax rate and limit local government control over taxes.
charlotte_impact: Impacts state and local finances and the balance of power between government entities.
